name: Crab & Asparagus Quiche
recipeIngredient: 8-inch pastry blind-baked or regular pie crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place crab meat in the bottom of the pastry shell.
3. Cut the bottoms off the asparagus spears and slice them into half-inch pieces, scattering over the crab meat.
4. Scatter Parmesan cheese over the asparagus.
5. Beat eggs and scalded milk together, seasoning with nutmeg, cayenne pepper, and salt.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the filling.
7. Arrange reserved asparagus tips in a spoke-like pattern on top.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for about 45 minutes to an hour until set.
9. Let cool for about 15 minutes before serving.
Note: For future recipes, consider substituting Swiss cheese for part of the Parmesan.
